　　绝世高手苏奕，穿越成了镇南侯府废物世子。
　　在侯府地位狗都不如？
　　在玉京城臭名昭著？
　　不慌，且看我如何逆天改命！
　　发现长公主的罕见的“太阴培龙之体”，苏奕连哄带骗将其拿下，因为强得可怕，长公主时常扶着墙走。
　　恰逢皇帝病重，九龙夺嫡，局势动荡。
　　苏奕利剑一横：“都滚开，这帝位，我老婆要了！”
　　于是他斩宗亲、压百官，助长公主登临帝位。
　　长公主：“死鬼，你太强了，要不这皇位让你来坐？”
　　苏奕揽美人入怀：“开什么玩笑，当皇帝多累啊，我当个后宫之主就好。”
　　太后：“苏奕别走，我冷。”
　　敌国和亲公主：“我生是苏奕的人，死是苏奕的鬼！”
　　苗疆圣女：“苏郎，我要给你生猴子。”
　　“……”
　   苏奕坐拥无数娇妻美妾，本想躺平逍遥度日，却不料诸侯叛乱、蛮族入侵。
　   于是他提枪上马，平动乱，灭敌国，威震寰宇！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/f8cb22707cff6b64c8f9b361a61827e1","author":"执笔时长两年半","author_id":"","book_id":"7520807766907178008","book_name":"世子这么猛，女帝只好躺赢了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#681010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3060人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":837,"name":"争霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=837&name=争霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7520808427220632088","read_count":"3060","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"412261"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.6","serial_count":"197","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,多女主,女帝,争霸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b21dfaecd9a72b3f8a913c1aa86f46d7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779253310&x-signature=hIQBo02J8YcM%2BNf6iybtjEchP8Q%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2991123995042967","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"16"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211301503C8FE50808418D2FBBF3"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"list
